channel.title: Synerthink
channel.description: Synerthink builds foundational computing products for autonomous systems. Dotlanth is a high-trust execution fabric focused on record-first observability, replayable runs, and capability-explicit security.

item.title: Why dotDSL Reads Like a Program
item.description: A research note on why dotDSL v0.1 is designed as a source language with a single dot file, explicit end blocks, strict validation, and capability declarations.

item.title: Why Dotlanth Is Record-First
item.description: A research note on Dotlanth's record-first model: one syscall boundary, explicit capabilities, and run history written by default.

item.title: Dotlanth v26.1.0-alpha
item.description: A foundational milestone for autonomous execution. Built seamlessly from the ground up for absolute trust and immediate inspectability.
